run_summary.summary: Three updates this run. Linkind has evolved — Liz pushed back hard on the revision requests on Apr 28, saying they're contradictory ('they don't want a close shot, but they don't want a wide shot'). She's willing to fix the CTA and caption but confused on the visual direction and offered to jump on a call with Mariah. Ball is in Linkind's court to clarify. The Flexsteel/Steinhafels Popfly campaign is moving — Kenny emailed Ian at Popfly today describing a 3-video concept (Video 1: tribute montage to Kenny's dad for 80th birthday + Father's Day, Video 2: shopping at Steinhafels, Video 3: reveal/gifting). They're sitting down to film Video 1, but the campaign is NOT showing on Liz's dashboard — Ian needs to reopen or set it as an invite. That's a blocker. Also created a Shabebe deal — Liz pitched Lauren at Shabebe LLC on Apr 27 for a backyard firepit patio collab featuring Rock Glue + hardscape products. Wise Block's Apr 30 deadline is still live — keeping the urgent flag active.

suggestions.message: Apr 30 deadline is in 2 days and Iris has followed up multiple times with no reply. If there's any interest in the Botanical Series collab, a rate quote needs to go out today. If not, a quick 'not the right fit right now' keeps the door open with Make Wonder INC for future opportunities.

Liz pushed back on the revision requests — she says the feedback is contradictory (no close shot AND no wide shot?) and she's frustrated. She offered to jump on a call with Mariah to sort it out. Keep an eye on Mariah's response — if they insist on all the same revisions, it may be worth a direct conversation to get clarity before Liz reshoot anything.

Flexsteel x Steinhafels filming is underway but there's a blocker — the Popfly campaign isn't showing on Liz's dashboard so she can't formally apply/sign up. Kenny asked Ian (ian@popfly.com) to reopen it or set it as an invite. Worth confirming that gets resolved before they finish filming Video 1. Three-video concept: tribute to Kenny's dad (80th bday/Father's Day) → Steinhafels shopping trip → reveal/gifting.

deals.next_action: Wait for Linkind/Mariah to respond to Liz's pushback on revision requests — she flagged contradictions and offered to jump on a call
deals.notes:
[Apr 28]: Liz pushed back on revision requests — says they're contradictory (don't want close shot, don't want wide shot). She's willing to add CTA + caption updates but says she already showed the Pattern Switch/Light Show and doesn't know how to proceed. Offered to jump on a call with Mariah. Ball in Linkind's court to clarify direction.
[Apr 28]: Linkind sent content revision requests via socialmediacollabs.com: (1) Missing Pattern Switch / Light Show feature demo — needs visual + voiceover with app group setup and dynamic color/animation effects, lens in correct position; (2) Reshoot 30-39s preset section in darker environment — lighting effects not visible in bright conditions, close-up shows only 1-2 lights not full setup; (3) Low-value 20-24s segment (tab switching) needs visual adjustment to match voiceover; (4) Add end CTA; (5) Caption updates — comment-for-link mechanism, tag brand account, add hashtags. Manager pushed back on item 1 but Linkind confirmed it is required.
deals.activity_note: Apr 28: Liz pushed back on Linkind revision requests — flagged contradictions, offered call. Waiting on Linkind/Mariah to clarify

deals.next_action: Confirm Flexsteel/Popfly campaign sign-up — campaign not showing on Liz's dashboard. Follow up with Ian at ian@popfly.com to reopen or set as invite
deals.notes: [Apr 28]: Kenny emailed Ian Saunders at Popfly (ian@popfly.com) — campaign not visible on Liz's dashboard, can't apply/sign up. Needs Ian to reopen or set as an invite. 3-video concept confirmed: Video 1 = montage/tribute to Kenny's dad (80th birthday + Father's Day, over-the-shoulder Steinhafels website/Flexsteel chair browsing); Video 2 = shopping at Steinhafels, testing the chair; Video 3 = reveal/gifting to dad. Filming Video 1 is imminent.
deals.activity_note: Apr 28: Flexsteel x Steinhafels Popfly campaign confirmed active — filming underway but campaign not on Liz's dashboard. Kenny following up with Ian at Popfly to resolve

deals.next_action: Wait for Lauren's response to firepit patio collab pitch
deals.notes: [Apr 27]: Liz sent outbound pitch to Lauren at Shabebe LLC (wenna@shabebellc.com). Concept: install raised patio with large pavers + pea gravel around fire pit + Adirondack chairs using Shabebe's Rock Glue and hardscape products. Framed as a DIY backyard firepit makeover — family-friendly outdoor space for gatherings. Sent media kit. CC'd Kenny.
